prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing
search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an
item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST
125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit.

=== PRODUCT CONTEXT ===
SKU: NPT-BLKKNIFE-HWT273BK-GPT
Product Type: SPORTING_GOODS
Brand (from catalog): ASR Tactical
Existing Title: Double Edge Spear Point Blade with Slim Kydex Sheath – Black
Description: Introducing the ASR Tactical Black Double-Edged Knife, a versatile and reliable tool designed for precision and durability. This high-quality knife features a sleek black spear point blade, perfect for a variety of cutting and piercing tasks. Its double-edged design offers enhanced versatility, allowing for efficient and precise handling. The stealth black handle provides a secure and ergonomic grip, ensuring optimal control during use. Crafted with a full tang construction, this knife offers exceptional strength and durability for long-lasting performance. The included black Kydex sheath ensures convenient storage and easy access, making it an essential tool for outdoor enthusiasts, adventurers, and tactical operators alike. Experience the power and versatility of the ASR Tactical Black Double-Edged Knife.
Search Terms: knife knives black sheath 4 inch blade full tang spear point cut cutting piercing slicing stealth edc sharp self defense handle ergonomic grip durable kydex reliable sword tactical camping hiking outdoors
Features:
- VERSATILE DOUBLE-EDGED DESIGN - The ASR Tactical Black Double-Edged Knife features a sleek black spear point blade with a double-edged design, allowing for versatile cutting and piercing applications
- SECURE AND ERGONOMIC GRIP - The stealth black handle provides a secure and ergonomic grip, ensuring optimal control and comfortable handling during use
- DURABLE FULL TANG CONSTRUCTION - Crafted with a full tang construction, this knife offers exceptional strength and durability for long-lasting performance in various demanding tasks
- BLACK KYDEX SHEATH INCLUDED - The knife comes with a black Kydex sheath that ensures secure storage and convenient carrying, keeping the knife safely within reach.
- SPECIFICATIONS - Blade Length: 4", Overall Length: 8.75", Weight: 0.45 lbs, Blade Material: 3CR13 Stainless Steel, Handle Color: Stealth Black

=== ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) ===
Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title,
not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order:
  ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name}
- brand: use the catalog brand above.
- pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a
  dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent.
- size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS).
Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number.
Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters.
Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing

=== TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) ===
Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most
search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a
repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable").
Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the
highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point.
Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep
acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out
"&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And
International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are
allowed.
Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name.

=== RETURN ===
Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape:
{"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Tactical 4" Black Double Edge Spear Point Knife

openai.item_name: ASR Tactical 4-Inch Black Double-Edged Spear Point Knife

anthropic.title_differentiation: Full Tang Construction, Ergonomic Grip, Double-Edged Spear Point Blade, Kydex Sheath Included, Tactical EDC

openai.title_differentiation: Full Tang 3CR13 Stainless Steel, Ergonomic Grip, Kydex Sheath, Stealth Black Finish, Precision Piercing And Cutting
